item.title: Murder Escape, Politician, Nurses Budget
item.ns0:title: FNM Leader Michael Pintard Demands Transparency Over Allegations Linking High-Ranking Politician to US Drug Trafficking Investigation — Saturday, May 30th, 2026
item.description:
Tonight on Our News Weekend, political tensions boil over as the opposition demands answers regarding a high-profile drug trafficking investigation while a captured murder suspect faces sentencing after months on the run. We examine the latest concerns from the Nurses Union over the national budget and highlight new initiatives aimed at helping young Bahamians achieve the dream of home ownership. Our team also follows a major wave of corporate giving across the islands and takes you inside a star-studded performance at Atlantis by a three-time Grammy winner. Catch the full broadcast for these headlines, a complete sports wrap-up, and more of the news you need to know.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.

Tonight on Our News Weekend, political tensions boil over as the opposition demands answers regarding a high-profile drug trafficking investigation while a captured murder suspect faces sentencing after months on the run. We examine the latest concerns from the Nurses Union over the national budget and highlight new initiatives aimed at helping young Bahamians achieve the dream of home ownership. Our team also follows a major wave of corporate giving across the islands and takes you inside a star-studded performance at Atlantis by a three-time Grammy winner. Catch the full broadcast for these headlines, a complete sports wrap-up, and more of the news you need to know.

We examine the latest concerns from the Nurses Union over the national budget and highlight new initiatives aimed at helping young Bahamians achieve the dream of home ownership. Our team also follows a major wave of corporate giving across the islands and takes you inside a star-studded performance at Atlantis by a three-time Grammy winner.
